This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

‚ÄúSupergirl,‚ÄĚ DC Studios‚Äô newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, ‚ÄúSupergirl,‚ÄĚ which will be in theaters and IMAX ¬ģ across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
tags: wifies|mumbo jumbo|dream|wifies arg|at the crossroads dont turn left|the king in yellow
description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

‚ě§‚ě§ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
‚ě§‚ě§ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


‚ě§‚ě§Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://share.epidemicsound.com/1xis5q/?playlist=uad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y

ūüéĶ Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

‚ÄúSupergirl,‚ÄĚ DC Studios‚Äô newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

‚ÄúSupergirl,‚ÄĚ DC Studios‚Äô newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

Performed live by Sami Yusuf and Atif Aslam at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi in November 2025, ‚ÄėMast Qalandar‚Äô is a celebrated qawwali of the Indian subcontinent, deeply rooted in centuries of Sufi tradition. The piece is based on a devotional poem attributed to the renowned Sufi poet and musical pioneer Amir Khusro, later expanded and enriched by the verses of the great Punjabi mystic Bulleh Shah. Its lyrics express reverence (not worship) for Ali ibn Abi Talib‚ÄĒwho holds central importance in Sufi spiritual lineage‚ÄĒand pay tribute to the revered 12th-century saint Lal Shahbaz Qalandar of Sindh.

Equally central to ‚ÄėMast Qalandar‚Äô is its powerful musical structure. Built on the traditional qawwali form, the piece unfolds through dynamic call-and-response passages, rhythmic handclaps, and a gradual intensification of tempo and energy. Driven by harmonium, sitar, percussion, and layered vocals, the music creates a state of spiritual elevation, where repetition and improvisation draw both performers and listeners into a shared experience of ecstasy. This intricate interplay between melody, rhythm, and vocal expression is what gives the qawwali its enduring emotional and spiritual impact.

Widely popularized in the modern era by Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, ‚ÄėMast Qalandar‚Äô has become one of the most iconic expressions of Sufi musical tradition, embodying themes of spiritual love and transcendence.

Performed brilliantly here by two contemporary musical icons.

tags: invincible season 4 episode 6|invincible season 4 episode 6 trailer|invincible season 4 episode 6 teaser trailer|invincible season 4 episode 6 first look trailer|invincible season 4 episode 6 official trailer|invincible season 4 episode 6 first trailer|invincible season 4 trailer|invincible season 4 episode 6 release date|invincible season 4 episode 6 cast|invincible season 4 episode 6 trailer 2026|tvspot
description:
Invincible - Season 4 | Final Trailer Episode 6 | invincible season 4 episode 6 trailer

Take a Look 'EPISODE 6 PROMO TRAILER' concept for Prime Video,s Invincible Season 4 Episode 6 Trailer

Invincible is an American adult animated superhero television series created by Robert Kirkman for the streaming service Amazon Prime Video, based on the Image Comics comic book series of the same name he co-created with Cory Walker and Ryan Ottley. It is produced by Skybound Entertainment, Wind Sun Sky Entertainment, Point Grey Pictures, and Amazon MGM Studios. The series follows teenager Mark Grayson, a human-alien hybrid being, who becomes a crime-fighting superhero known as "Invincible" under the guidance of his father, Nolan Grayson / Omni-Man, the most powerful superhero on the planet. During his transformation, Mark finds himself struggling between his personal life and superhero duties and is forced to prove that he can be the hero that his father is, unaware of a conspiracy that threatens the world and leaves him questioning the true nature of his role. Steven Yeun stars in the series as Mark Grayson / Invincible alongside J. K. Simmons and Sandra Oh as Mark's father and mother, Nolan Grayson / Omni-Man and Debbie Grayson, respectively, while the remaining cast members have recurring roles.

Invincible premiered its eight-episode first season across March and April 2021, after which Amazon renewed the series for a second and third season. A prequel special, "Invincible: Atom Eve", was released in July 2023. The eight-episode second season was divided into two parts, first released in November 2023, then across March and April 2024. The eight-episode third season was released between February and March 2025. The fourth season premiered on March 18, 2026. A fifth season has also been announced ahead of its release.

The series has received widespread critical acclaim, with praise for its animation, action sequences, story, voice performances (particularly Yeun, Oh, and Simmons), faithfulness to the comics, and emotional weight. It has been nominated for two Primetime Emmy Awards, two Annie Awards and the Critics' Choice Television Award for Best Animated Series.

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel‚ÄĒMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as ‚ÄúLily‚ÄĚ and ‚ÄúIrv‚ÄĚ from the first film. 
 
‚ÄúThe Devil Wears Prada 2‚ÄĚ is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

title: Escape From Alcatraz
description: Superstar Clint Eastwood and director Don Siegal re-team for their fifth film in this fascinating account of the only three men ever to escape from the infamous maximum security prison at Alcatraz. In 29 years, the seemingly impenetrable federal penitentiary, which housed Al Capone and "Birdman" Robert Stroud, was only broken once- by three men never heard of again. Eastwood portrays Frank Morris, the cunning bank robber who masterminded the elaborately detailed and, as far as anyone knows, ultimately successful, escape. Patrick McGoohan is a superb counterpoint as the suspicious warden. Filmed on location in Alcatraz, this gritty and realistic reenactment of a true story has all the power one expects of an Eastwood/Siegel movie.

tags: invincible season 4 episode 6|invincible season 4 episode 6 trailer|invincible season 4 episode 6 teaser trailer|invincible season 4 episode 6 first look trailer|invincible season 4 episode 6 official trailer|invincible season 4 episode 6 first trailer|invincible season 4 trailer|invincible season 4 episode 6 release date|invincible season 4 episode 6 cast|invincible season 4 episode 6 trailer 2026|tvspot
description:
Invincible - Season 4 | Final Trailer Episode 6 | invincible season 4 episode 6 trailer

Take a Look 'EPISODE 6 PROMO TRAILER' concept for Prime Video,s Invincible Season 4 Episode 6 Trailer

Invincible is an American adult animated superhero television series created by Robert Kirkman for the streaming service Amazon Prime Video, based on the Image Comics comic book series of the same name he co-created with Cory Walker and Ryan Ottley. It is produced by Skybound Entertainment, Wind Sun Sky Entertainment, Point Grey Pictures, and Amazon MGM Studios. The series follows teenager Mark Grayson, a human-alien hybrid being, who becomes a crime-fighting superhero known as "Invincible" under the guidance of his father, Nolan Grayson / Omni-Man, the most powerful superhero on the planet. During his transformation, Mark finds himself struggling between his personal life and superhero duties and is forced to prove that he can be the hero that his father is, unaware of a conspiracy that threatens the world and leaves him questioning the true nature of his role. Steven Yeun stars in the series as Mark Grayson / Invincible alongside J. K. Simmons and Sandra Oh as Mark's father and mother, Nolan Grayson / Omni-Man and Debbie Grayson, respectively, while the remaining cast members have recurring roles.

Invincible premiered its eight-episode first season across March and April 2021, after which Amazon renewed the series for a second and third season. A prequel special, "Invincible: Atom Eve", was released in July 2023. The eight-episode second season was divided into two parts, first released in November 2023, then across March and April 2024. The eight-episode third season was released between February and March 2025. The fourth season premiered on March 18, 2026. A fifth season has also been announced ahead of its release.

The series has received widespread critical acclaim, with praise for its animation, action sequences, story, voice performances (particularly Yeun, Oh, and Simmons), faithfulness to the comics, and emotional weight. It has been nominated for two Primetime Emmy Awards, two Annie Awards and the Critics' Choice Television Award for Best Animated Series.

This is not a story of heartbreak‚ÄĒit‚Äôs the moment after, when the tears are gone and something stronger takes their place.

With a deeply intimate vocal performance, the song unfolds like a late-night reflection. Every note carries the weight of what was lost‚Ä¶ and the strength of what remains.

‚ÄúI Won‚Äôt Cry For You‚ÄĚ captures that rare emotional turning point‚ÄĒwhen letting go is no longer painful, but peaceful. It‚Äôs about reclaiming your voice, your space, and your identity after loving someone who could never meet you fully.

This is modern blues at its most honest: raw, elegant, and deeply human.

If you‚Äôve ever walked away without looking back‚Ä¶ this song will stay with you.

description:
In the quiet aftermath of love, where silence no longer hurts, ‚ÄúI Won‚Äôt Cry For You‚ÄĚ by Morgan Luna becomes a powerful Soul Blues anthem of healing, clarity, and self-worth. This is not a story of heartbreak‚ÄĒit‚Äôs the moment after, when the tears are gone and something stronger takes their place.

With a deeply intimate vocal performance, the song unfolds like a late-night reflection. The guitar speaks in soft, aching phrases, while Rhodes and organ create a warm, enveloping atmosphere that feels both fragile and unshakable. Every note carries the weight of what was lost‚Ä¶ and the strength of what remains.

‚ÄúI Won‚Äôt Cry For You‚ÄĚ captures that rare emotional turning point‚ÄĒwhen letting go is no longer painful, but peaceful. It‚Äôs about reclaiming your voice, your space, and your identity after loving someone who could never meet you fully.

This is modern blues at its most honest: raw, elegant, and deeply human.

If you‚Äôve ever walked away without looking back‚Ä¶ this song will stay with you.

title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
tags: Trailer
description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song ‚ÄúRunway‚ÄĚ performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel‚ÄĒMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as ‚ÄúLily‚ÄĚ and ‚ÄúIrv‚ÄĚ from the first film. 
 
‚ÄúThe Devil Wears Prada 2‚ÄĚ is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

Welcome to the official "Oscar & Deep" channel.

"Oscar & Deep" is a melodic electronic music project focused on deep emotions, atmospheric soundscapes, and hypnotic grooves. The music blends elements of deep house, melodic house, progressive house, downtempo, and melodic techno, creating immersive electronic journeys designed for night drives, late-night listening, and moments of deep reflection.

This channel is dedicated to emotional electronic music with deep atmospheres, smooth grooves, and powerful bass. The goal is to create music that feels cinematic, immersive, and perfect for driving, relaxing, or focusing.

Perfect music for:
Night drives
Late-night listening
Driving & road trips
Relaxing & studying
Deep focus

title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
tags: Trailer
description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song ‚ÄúRunway‚ÄĚ performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel‚ÄĒMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as ‚ÄúLily‚ÄĚ and ‚ÄúIrv‚ÄĚ from the first film. 
 
‚ÄúThe Devil Wears Prada 2‚ÄĚ is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

‚ÄúSupergirl,‚ÄĚ DC Studios‚Äô newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, ‚ÄúSupergirl,‚ÄĚ which will be in theaters and IMAX ¬ģ across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
tags: wifies|mumbo jumbo|dream|wifies arg|at the crossroads dont turn left|the king in yellow
description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

‚ě§‚ě§ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
‚ě§‚ě§ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


‚ě§‚ě§Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://share.epidemicsound.com/1xis5q/?playlist=uad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y

ūüéĶ Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.
